Release notes for Pebble Firmware BETA5-136 detailing new features and bug fixes.

# Purpose
The release notes document the updates and bug fixes in the Pebble Firmware BETA5-136. New features include support for the charging LED on Pebble Steel and the ability to upgrade 1.x apps to 2.x. Bug fixes address mutex instrumentation for deadlock debugging, a new timer infrastructure, and clock changes to resolve display and power issues.
